chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA. N0.D-692 0{ 2014. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge ERESHCASE For orders on office objection A For orders on MA No 2598/٦4 EA For hearing of main case 19.02.2018 This petition was filed ٥٨ 16.6.2014 and since then learned counsel for the petitioner or petitioner have taken no interest to see that this matter is posted in the Court for the purpose of issuing notice which is indicative of the fact that they have no interest to pursue this ١٢٠ Athar Abbas Solangi Advocate is holding brief on matter Today of counsel for the petitioner but has not been able to show any behalf for not taking interest in this petition for that last almost valid reason the circumstances this petition is dismissed f0٢ four years non prosecution alongwith listed applications J٤ ؟٧٥، ٥ ٧٧ G ٤ C.P. دمم و
